summaryAm: የዝንጅብል እንጀራ ሰው በደስታ ሲሮጥ መስማትና መመለስን የሚማርበት ተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: መጫወት ደስ ይላል፣ ግን ደህንነትን መስማት ይበልጣል።

source.name: Public-domain classic or folktale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: አንዲት እናት የዝንጅብል እንጀራ ሰው ጋገረች።
pages.textEn: A mother baked a gingerbread man.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Gingerbread Man, page 1: አንዲት እናት የዝንጅብል እንጀራ ሰው ጋገረች።

pages.textEn: The gingerbread man jumped happily from the tray and said he would run.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Gingerbread Man, page 2: እንጀራው በደስታ ከመድቡ ወጥቶ “እሮጣለሁ!” አለ።

pages.textAm: በጓሮ ውስጥ ዶሮ፣ ድመት እና ልጆች በሳቅ ተከተሉት።
pages.textEn: In the yard, a chicken, a cat, and children followed him with laughter.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Gingerbread Man, page 3: በጓሮ ውስጥ ዶሮ፣ ድመት እና ልጆች በሳቅ ተከተሉት።

pages.textAm: በጓሮው አጥር አጠገብ እንስሳቱ በደግነት እንዲቆም ጠሩት። እሱ ግን ገና በደስታ ይሮጥ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Near the yard fence, the animals kindly called for him to stop, but he was still running with excitement.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm storybook illustration of farm animals kindly calling to a gingerbread man near a sunny yard fence.

pages.textAm: ወንዙ አጠገብ ሲደርስ ቆመ። “ብቻዬን መሻገር ደህና አይደለም” ብሎ በቀስታ አሰበ።
pages.textEn: When he reached the river, he stopped and gently thought that crossing alone was not safe.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm storybook illustration of a gingerbread man stopping safely beside a bright river.

pages.textAm: እንጀራው ቆሞ ጓደኞቹን ጠበቀ። “እንዴት በደህና መጫወት እንደምችል አሳዩኝ” ብሎ ጠየቀ።
pages.textEn: The gingerbread man stopped and waited for his friends, asking them to show him how to play safely.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Gingerbread Man, page 6: gingerbread man waiting for friends and asking how to play safely.

pages.textAm: ጓደኞቹ መጀመሪያ የጓሮውን መንገድ አሳዩት። “በደስታ መሮጥ ደስ ይላል፣ ግን መንገድን ማወቅ ያስፈልጋል” አሉ።
pages.textEn: His friends first showed him the yard path and said running is fun, but knowing the path matters.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Gingerbread man and friends looking at a safe running path through a sunny yard.

pages.textAm: ዶሮዋ “በዚህ መስመር እንሮጣለን” አለች። ድመቷም “ማቆሚያ ምልክት ሲመጣ ሁላችንም እንቆማለን” ብላ አሳየች።
pages.textEn: The chicken marked the running line, and the cat showed everyone where to stop.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Chicken and cat setting a safe running line and stop sign for the gingerbread man in a yard.

pages.textAm: በአጥሩ አጠገብ ሁሉም በተራ መሮጥን ተለማመዱ። እንጀራውም መስማት ጨዋታን የበለጠ ደስ እንደሚያሰኝ አየ።
pages.textEn: By the fence, everyone practiced taking turns, and the gingerbread man saw that listening made the game happier.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Farm friends and the gingerbread man practicing taking turns in a safe running game by a yard fence.

pages.textAm: ልጆቹ በቅጠል ላይ ትንሽ ድልድይ አሳዩት፣ ግን መጀመሪያ አዋቂን መጠየቅ እንዳለባቸው ተስማሙ።
pages.textEn: The children agreed they should ask a grown-up before crossing.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Children and a gingerbread man looking at a small bridge near a river.

pages.textAm: በቤት ውስጥ ሁሉም ትንሽ የሩጫ ጨዋታ አዘጋጁ። እንጀራውም መስማት ጨዋታን የበለጠ ደህና እንደሚያደርግ ተማረ።
pages.textEn: Back home, everyone made a safe running game, and he learned to listen.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Gingerbread man and children playing a safe indoor running game.
